zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bigod於1334年出生在英國越可爾澤特林頓時，他的父親Roger le Bigod43歲，母親Joan25歲。他於1363年與Amy Settrington結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年11月19日在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾澤特林頓享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾澤特林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bigod于1334年出生在英国越可爾澤特林頓时，他的父亲Roger le Bigod43岁，母亲Joan25岁。他于1363年与Amy Settrington结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年11月19日在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾澤特林頓享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾澤特林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bigod was born in 1334, in Settrington, Yorkshire, England, his father, Roger le Bigod, was 43 and his mother, Joan, was 25. He married Amy Settrington in 1363. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 November 1388, in Settrington, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Settrington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bigod est né en 1334, à Settrington, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Roger le Bigod, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Amy Settrington en 1363. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 novembre 1388, à Settrington, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Settrington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bigodが1334年にイギリスヨークシュアイアセットリントンで生まれた時，父Roger le Bigodは43歳，母Joanは25歳であった。1363年にAmy Settringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年11月19日にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアセットリントンで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアセットリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bigod(이)가 1334년 영국 요르크실르 세트링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger le Bigod(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1363년 Amy Settrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 11월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 세트링턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 세트링턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bigod родился в 1334 г. в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger le Bigod было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Joan, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Amy Settrington в 1363 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 ноября 1388 г. в местности сеттрингтон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
